(<sense id="n116406.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hóšî 'āh-nâ</tr_>), <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">save now!</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὡ. τῷ υἱῷ Δαβίδ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg001.perseus-grc1:21:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Ev.Matt.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">21.9</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
